no_changes_rationale:
status: needs_investigation
reason: FEAT-014 and FEAT-016 already contain explicit MET wiki links, so no cross-reference edit was necessary in the named scope. Evidence: docs/helix/01-frame/features/FEAT-014-token-awareness.md:434-437 links [[MET-001]] and [[MET-002]], and docs/helix/01-frame/features/FEAT-016-process-metrics.md:113-116 links [[MET-002]]. The remaining acceptance gate, "ddx doc audit clean", is blocked by preexisting repo-wide integrity issues outside this bead's scope: `ddx doc audit` reports 86 issues total, including 84 duplicate_id entries, one cycle involving FEAT-002 -> FEAT-008 -> FEAT-013 -> FEAT-014 -> FEAT-016 -> FEAT-020 -> MET-002 -> SD-013 -> SD-019 -> FEAT-002, and one missing dependency for helix.workflow.principles. Fixing that graph drift requires broader doc-graph cleanup beyond this targeted cross-reference bead.
